features: MODERN DESIGN: The modern design still has all the essential features such as an earphone socket and access to the latest AM/FM radio stations. The compact size, complete with telescopic swivel antenna, offers personal radio great to carry with you along on a trip or while you're out and about.

EASY TO USE: The simple design allows for easy set-up and operation, suitable for all to enjoy. Tune into your favourite AM and FM stations by searching on the tuner for different frequencies and watching the tuning window. Rotate the rotary dial to search between stations and the smaller dial on the opposite side to adjust the volume level.

SPEAKER OR EARPHONES: This radio has an earphone socket and comes complete with a pair of stereo earphones. Use the built-in speaker to enjoy listening or alternatively plug in the included earphones for private listening.

PORTABLE: The LLOYTRON "Galaxy" 2 Band Personal Radio is small and lightweight enough to carry with you, making it ideal for travelling, camping trips, walking, fishing and more. Extend the telescopic antenna for better reception of radio signals.
BATTERY OPERATED: To power, simply insert 2 x AAA batteries (not included). Use your personal sports radio wirelessly without the need to plug in or recharge.
description: From the manufacturer The radio features both FM and AM frequencies, allowing you to access a wide range of radio stations for music, news, and entertainment. With the ability to tune into both AM and FM signals, this radio provides versatile listening options to suit your preferences. This personal radio is designed to be conveniently powered by batteries, so you can take it with you wherever you go. Compact and lightweight, it is perfect for outdoor activities, traveling, or simply enjoying music and news on the move. The battery-powered feature ensures non-stop, uninterrupted listening. The radio comes with earphone socket and included earphones for versatile listening options, as well as rotary volume and tuning controls for personalised preferences, this radio allows users to tune into their favourite stations with ease while staying connected on the go. Presenting the sleek and compact personal radio, exquisitely packaged in a beautifully designed gift box. This modern and stylish radio is the perfect gift for music and sports lovers alike. Its slim and compact design makes it highly portable, allowing users to enjoy their favourite stations on the go.
